payload.answer: Ambiguous Sam note detected with low confidence and cloud escalation disabled. Please choose how to handle it.
citations: Cloud escalation disabled and model confidence low for ambiguous Sam note.
repair_options: Keep the note as ambiguous and do not change existing memory.
Treat this as a separate possible Sam-related note without merging it with any existing Sam entry.
Ask the user to clarify which Sam and which fact should be associated before any memory update.
Hold the note for review and avoid committing any durable memory until clarified.
